title: RoomTypeEntry
description: Per-entry metaschema for shared/standards/spaces/room-types/*.json files. Validates entries authored across the 13 room-type-applicable OmniClass Table 13 parent_category files (one per T13 level-2 parent code), plus OmniClass Table 11 construction-entity entries, and Uniclass 2015 Table SL entries. taxonomy_source discriminates between the three taxonomies; omniclass_code required for OmniClass entries; uniclass_code required for Uniclass entries (enforced via allOf). NOTE: residential is absent from T13 (Spaces by Function); residential spaces live in OmniClass Table 11 (Construction Entities by Function) and Uniclass 2015 SL. Three construction-element parents (13-13 Void Areas, 13-15 Wall Spaces, 13-17 Encroachment Spaces) excluded as not Room.type-applicable — see _source/OmniClass-Table-13-source-notes.md §Phase X.B scope reduction.

canonical_id.description: Snake_case dotted identifier used as Room.type in SkillInput. Format: parent_category.sub_category.entry_name. First segment matches the parent_category enum (snake_case names with underscores). Examples: healthcare_spaces.operating_theatre_general, education_and_training_spaces.classroom_general, parking_spaces.surface_lot, space_planning_types.planned_work_space.

taxonomy_source.description: Source taxonomy discriminator. OmniClass entries require omniclass_code; Uniclass entries require uniclass_code (enforced via allOf).

omniclass_code.description: OmniClass Table 13 or Table 11 verbatim 5-segment code. Format: 13-XX XX XX XX XX (T13 Spaces by Function) or 11-XX XX XX XX XX (T11 Construction Entities by Function). Sourced from declared public mirror per sprint-X-source-provenance.md. Required when taxonomy_source is OmniClass-Table-13 or OmniClass-Table-11.

uniclass_code.description: Uniclass 2015 Table SL 6-digit notation (SL_XX_XX_XX). Required when taxonomy_source = Uniclass-2015-SL.

building_type_codes.description: Optional. SL room entries reference OmniClass T11 building codes for rollup (e.g. residential.bedroom_master → [11-11 11 11] single-family residence).

parent_category.description: Snake_case canonical name of the taxonomy level-2 parent. For T13 entries: one of the 13 room-type-applicable T13 parents (per pdfcoffee mirror 2026-06-05 + NIBS NBIMS-US V3 §2.4.4.3 wrapper) — three construction-element parents excluded. For T11 entries: construction_entities. For Uniclass SL entries: residential, commercial, retail, hospitality, industrial, agricultural, transport, or one of the 13 T13 names. MUST match the level-2 segment of the applicable code (e.g. parent_category=healthcare_spaces ↔ omniclass_code starts with 13-51).

parent_code.description: OPTIONAL convenience field — verbatim T13 level-2 parent code (e.g. '13-31' for education_and_training_spaces). Consumers can lookup by code OR by snake_case parent_category name. MUST equal the level-2 segment of omniclass_code when present.

parent_path.description: Hierarchical drill-down path (3-level max). E.g. [healthcare_spaces, treatment, operating_theatre]. First element MUST equal parent_category.

common_aliases.description: Non-canonical synonyms from architectural practice. Powers fuzzy-match lookup for orchestrators receiving non-canonical strings from drawing parsers. E.g. ['operating room', 'OR', 'theatre', 'surgery suite'].

ifc_space_type.description: Coarse IfcSpaceTypeEnum value per ISO 16739. Mostly INTERNAL (indoor) or EXTERNAL (outdoor).

_verification_status.description: Per-entry sourcing record. mirror_sourced=default (verbatim from declared OmniClass mirror URL). occs_verified=cross-checked against OCCS canonical PDF (back-fill). inferred=synthesised from hierarchy (MUST honest-disclose in _inference_note). nbs_sourced=verbatim from NBS Source / designingbuildings Uniclass mirror (Uniclass entries). engineering_consensus=Uniclass-style code synthesised citing CIBSE / ASHRAE / BS engineering authority when NBS Source coverage is partial (MUST honest-disclose in _inference_note).

_inference_note.description: REQUIRED when _verification_status=inferred. Explains the inference (e.g. 'parent code 13-37 31 00 00 present in mirror; child code synthesised from OmniClass numbering pattern').

_source_mirror.description: URL of the mirror this entry was sourced from (per-entry override if not the primary declared in sprint-X-source-provenance.md).

bs_en_12464_1.description: Key path into shared/standards/lighting/BSEN12464/lux-levels.json (e.g. 'office.open_plan') OR null if no match.

cibse_lg.description: Null until Sprint Y back-fills paid CIBSE source.

nrm2.description: Null until Sprint Y back-fills paid NRM2 source.
